历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 11639 → 14349 → 16212 → 20990 → 18319, showing an overall backward trend, with a cumulative backward shift of about 6680 positions over the past 5 years; the 2025 baseline is approximately 18319, rebounding by about 2671 positions compared to 2024, indicating a recovery after a significant drop in 2024; the provincial Physics Category enrollment plan was 20 in 2021 → 55 in 2022 → 53 in 2023 → 52 in 2024 → 56 in 2025 → 55 in 2026, with a reduction of 1 student (-1.8%) in 2026 compared to 2025, slightly easing competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class university; the Soft Science main ranking has steadily risen from 100th in 2021 to 79th in 2026, indicating improving comprehensive strength and recognition; recent reputation is stable, with no significant negative public opinion or enrollment gaps; Douyin popularity ranking is 80th, rated as 'average', with short video exposure at a moderate level, showing no abnormal surge in application attention; Ethnology A+ (top nationally), Sociology A-, Chinese Language and Literature A-, directly corresponding to majors like Sociology and Chinese Language and Literature in the enrollment, attracting applicants to related fields.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: STEM majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering remain persistently hot/highly recommended; Minzu University of China's Physics Category enrollment includes popular majors like Computer Science and Electronic Information, attracting students; the total number of regular college entrance exam takers in the province in 2026 is about 521,000, a significant increase of about 46% from approximately 358,000 in 2025, with the number of Physics Category candidates expected to grow substantially, intensifying competition; the provincial control line (undergraduate batch) rose from 417 in 2021 to 463 in 2025, reflecting an overall improvement in student performance; located in Beijing, the university has some regional appeal to Jiangsu students; its enrollment proportion in Jiangsu is about 2%-3% (56 Physics Category students in 2025 out of total national plan), with a small scale, making rankings susceptible to individual high-scoring applicants' decisions.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the overall backward trend in historical rankings, the significant increase in Physics Category candidates in 2026 (about +46%), the rising Soft Science ranking boosting application popularity, and the limited easing effect of a slight enrollment reduction (-1.8%) in 2026, competition is expected to intensify slightly based on the 2025 baseline of 18319; the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 18153, with a range of 17653–18653.
